name: Lemongrass Chicken
recipeInstructions:
NOTES:
A. Lemongrass: Remove outer leaves of the lemongrass and finely slice the tender white part at the base of the stalk. Bruise on the cutting board with a large mortar and pestle, cleaver handle, or wine bottle. A cuisinart with a 1mm slicer will also work; smashing is acceptable.
B. Fish Sauce: Nuoc Mam brand (Tiparos from Thailand). Fish sauce can be from Vietnam or Cambodia and should be tasted to determine saltiness and taste. Avoid cloudy, unfiltered products; the best is tea-colored and semi-clear to coffee colored.
1. Mix chicken pieces with salt, pepper, lemongrass, and scallions. Set aside for at least 30 minutes; overnight is better.
2. Heat a wok, add oil when hot. Add chicken pieces and stir-fry for 3 or more minutes.
3. Add chili peppers and continue stirring until chicken no longer appears pink, cooking over medium heat.
4. Season with sugar and additional black pepper (or white pepper).
5. Add chicken stock and stir for a few more minutes.
6. Garnish with Nuoc Mam, peanuts, and coriander.
